overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment at night. The player exits an indoor commercial space with art installations onto the wet streets of Night City, passing by food vendors, digital billboards, and pedestrians before crossing intersections.

person in dark clothing standing with arms crossed

large screen displaying advertisements on the ceiling
yellow square tiles covering the floor
metal barred gate leading to the outside street
industrial ventilation system mounted on the dark wall

segments.scene_description: The player begins inside a modern commercial building with yellow tiled flooring and futuristic decor. Large spherical neon sculptures dominate the space while digital billboards play on the ceiling. A few NPCs stand around near the exit gate as the player walks forward and turns to observe the art installation.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor food court with ramen stand

events.description: moves from the art installation lobby into the food service area

agents.ego_description: walking toward a neon-lit food stand, passing by seating areas

tall stools lined up at the food counter
small tree in a planter box
lounge chairs and tables in a recessed area

segments.scene_description: The player enters a food service area featuring a prominent ramen stand illuminated by vibrant purple neon. The space maintains the yellow tile flooring while adding natural elements like decorative trees. The player walks past bar stools and approaches the service counter before heading toward the exit.

events.description: exits the building onto the wet city street with neon lights
futuristic vehicles pass by on the street alongside the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk under an elevated highway, observing the neon-lit street

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street with headlights on

rain-slicked pavement reflecting neon lights
tropical tree lining the sidewalk

large screen displaying video advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player exits the building onto a wet city street glistening with neon reflections. An elevated highway runs parallel to the sidewalk while palm trees line the path. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the road, and the player walks under the overpass toward distant neon signs.

events.description: pedestrian density increases as the camera approaches a popular commercial area

agents.ego_description: walking past the Night City sign and outdoor restaurant seating, navigating through pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and pink leggings walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading NIGHT CITY with logo
large white umbrellas shading restaurant tables
modern glass front of commercial building with reflections
circular neon sign with Japanese characters
large rectangular planter with greenery

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a bustling commercial sidewalk featuring the prominent Night City neon sign. Outdoor dining areas with large umbrellas line the right side, while pedestrians in futuristic attire walk along the path. The glass facades of modern buildings reflect the colorful neon lights.

events.description: begins crossing the street at a crosswalk intersection
futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection, watching for traffic while moving toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: silver futuristic car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
black and yellow bollards separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
tall illuminated tower with multiple levels and neon accents
multiple large screens suspended above the street
tall pole with illuminated traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The player steps onto a wide crosswalk with bold yellow stripes, crossing the intersection toward a towering skyscraper. Traffic moves through the intersection as the player navigates between barriers. Overhead digital billboards illuminate the open plaza area with vibrant advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sterile, curated interior of a commercial art space into the sprawling, neon-drenched chaos of a futuristic city street. It begins inside a modern building with yellow tiled floors, moving past spherical neon sculptures and digital ceiling billboards before gliding into a food service area anchored by a vibrant purple ramen stand and decorative trees. As the camera pushes forward, the interior environment gives way to the open air, transitioning onto a wet sidewalk where the ground glistens with reflections under an elevated highway and towering palm trees. The scene then expands along a bustling commercial strip lined with outdoor dining umbrellas and glass facades that mirror the glow of the prominent Night City sign. Finally, the movement leads the viewer across a wide, yellow-striped crosswalk and through a busy intersection toward a towering skyscraper beneath a canopy of brilliant overhead advertisements.
